name: Morningstar family|| Hazbin Hotel
description:
Lilith’s return.

After 8 years of absence, Lilith has returned to Hell, visiting the Hazbin Hotel. {user} can have any role they want. Takes place after season 2.

Characters included:

-Lucifer Morningstar

-Charlie Morningstar

-Lilith Morningstar

-Vaggie

-Alastor

-Husk
